thesis: Separate what LocalAIFactory has proven locally (internal completeness, which we control) from overall commercial GA (gated by external proofs we cannot self-produce). No dimension is scored as if an external proof exists when it does not.

scoring.internalScore: how complete/proven the dimension is using only locally-producible evidence
scoring.gaScoreNow: honest overall-GA contribution TODAY (external-gated dimensions are held down until real proof exists)
scoring.gaScoreWhenProofsSupplied: projected contribution once the named external proof is genuinely supplied (NOT a claim it exists)

dimensions.evidence: dotnet build Release green; 8 projects, no cycles
security-audit.ps1, least-privilege SQL, Data Protection at rest, no secrets committed
Windows/Negotiate + dev-auth; OIDC config + claims-mapping validators present
HTTPS pilot binding with a self-signed localhost cert
Mode A IIS + ANCM in-process deploy/healthcheck/rollback drills passed
29,540 req HTTPS+Windows-auth smoke load, 0 HTTP 500s, p99<130ms (workstation)
backup script + rollback drill + documented procedure
dimensions.externalProof: scheduled offsite backup + verified restore drill on prod (BLOCKED_OPERATOR)

dimensions.evidence: 7 knowledge packs, 51-repo deterministic benchmark, local-LLM proof with hallucination refusal
acceptance test + handover walkthrough + EMULATED signoff
dimensions.externalProof: signed pilot on sanitized customer data (BLOCKED_CUSTOMER)

classificationRationale: Internal completeness is high (84.8) and every remaining gap is an externally-owned proof that is fully MODELLED + OWNED + VALIDATABLE (operator/external/customer) but NOT yet supplied. Overall GA today is held honestly at 65.4 because no external proof has been faked. Projected GA on genuine external-proof delivery is 94.3 — still not asserted as achieved.
